name: ASRock Challenger CL-750B 750W Power Supply - 80 PLUS BRONZE Certified - 120mm Golf-blade Fan - Built-in 5V BOOST Function - ATX 2.52 - PCIe 5.1 12+4-pin 450W Connector - 2x PCIe 6+2-pin Connectors (CL-750B)
